ddls:
CREATE TABLE "course" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the department that offers the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semester" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "section" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course that this section belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the semester that this section belongs to */,
  "section_number" INTEGER /* Section number */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the instructor that teaches this section */,
  "enrollment_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in this section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the section that this enrollment belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student that this enrollment belongs to */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, waitlisted, dropped) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date that the student enrolled in the course */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date that the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "enrolled" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the course */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Number of available spots in the course */,
  "waitlisted" INTEGER /* Number of students waitlisted for the course */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of students accounted for (enrolled + waitlisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the enrollment record that this history belongs to */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, waitlisted, dropped) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date that the enrollment status changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, faculty, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
